notableEvents.label: Will Brennan pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Brennan pops out to third baseman Alec Bohm.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Drew Gilbert. Adolis García scores.

notableEvents.label: Adolis García GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adolis García grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Bryce Harper out at 2nd. Adolis García out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adolis García rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adolis García grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Bryce Harper out at 2nd. Adolis García out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Marsh pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Brandon Marsh to 3rd. Garrett Stubbs out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Brandon Marsh to 3rd. Garrett Stubbs out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.
